audit_items.proof_trace: Within gzip_stream.h, the only inline code accesses `zcontext_.msg` where `zcontext_` is declared as a value-type struct member (`z_stream zcontext_`), not a pointer — field access on a value member cannot be a null dereference. The `msg` field (potentially NULL per zlib semantics) is only returned to callers, never dereferenced within the header. All other inline methods return plain integers with no pointer dereferences.
